# tfe_provider_set

Manages provider sets.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the provider set.
- `provider_source` (String) Source address of the provider, e.g. registry.terraform.io/hashicorp/tfe.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `description` (String) The description of the provider set.
- `global` (Boolean) Whether the provider set applies globally.
- `organization` (String) Name of the organization. If omitted, organization must be defined in the provider config.
- `project_ids` (Set of String) The project IDs attached to the provider set.
- `provider_config_hcl` (String) The provider configuration managed by the provider set, expressed as a single HCL provider block
- `provider_config_hcl_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The provider configuration managed by the provider set, expressed as a single HCL provider block in write-only mode.
- `provider_config_hcl_wo_version` (Number) Version of the write-only provider configuration to trigger updates.
- `workspace_ids` (Set of String) The workspace IDs attached to the provider set.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the provider set.
